entries.title: Personalized Beauty Report
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Recommendation-report layouts for beauty and lifestyle products.

Use a report-like hierarchy with diagnosis, recommendation, and product cards.
Keep product images, labels, and ratings aligned.
Avoid medical claims and unreadable dense notes.
Keep recommendation logic simple.
entries.description: Recommendation-report layouts for beauty and lifestyle products.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的商业条目《Personalized Beauty Report》。 关键词：Product、UI、Commerce、Fashion。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Brand Touchpoint Board
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Campaign boards across packaging, social, web, and display contexts.

Specify touchpoint list, shared visual rules, and mockup arrangement.
Use one palette and one typography logic across all panels.
Avoid mixing many unrelated campaign styles.
Limit touchpoints if readability drops.
entries.description: Campaign boards across packaging, social, web, and display contexts.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的商业条目《Brand Touchpoint Board》。 关键词：Brand、Product、Commerce、Social。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Product Commerce Visual
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Product shots, packaging, detail pages, and selling-point layouts.

Define product, selling points, material, scene, lighting, and layout blocks.
Separate hero product, benefit labels, and supporting props.
Avoid random props that weaken product recognition.
Constrain packaging text and claim wording.
entries.description: Product shots, packaging, detail pages, and selling-point layouts.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的商业条目《Product Commerce Visual》。 关键词：Product、Realistic、Commerce、Food。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Brand Identity Package
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Logo, palette, typography, applications, and brand touchpoints.

Define brand name, positioning, palette, typography, logo usage, and touchpoints.
Ask for a coherent board with aligned applications.
Avoid unrelated logo variants and inconsistent palettes.
Keep brand text accurate.
entries.description: Logo, palette, typography, applications, and brand touchpoints.
